source.multipart_basis: Decomposition reflects a cylindrical AUV pressure hull with removable flat end caps, internal payload frames, and through-hull penetrators explicitly called out by the original brief. Forward/aft domes, cylindrical shell, internal frames, end-cap flanges, through-hull fittings, and mounting rails are separated. No rulebook citations added beyond those carried by the original sample.

full_prompt: Deliver the main electronics pressure hull of an AUV for the 2025 İnsansız Su Altı Sistemleri Yarışması as a multi-body assembly rather than a single solid. The competition finals are held in an indoor pool of max depth 5 m; design depth for structural qualification uses an ABS-style proof pressure of 4 x operational depth, so the hull must survive an external hydrostatic pressure equivalent to 20 m fresh water (1.96 bar gauge normal mission, 7.84 bar gauge proof, 9.8 bar gauge burst margin). The hull is a horizontal cylindrical pressure vessel with outer diameter 150 mm and total length 400 mm (excluding end-cap seals); two removable flat end caps seal via double radial Parker 2-150 Buna-N 70A o-rings. Cylindrical shell and end caps are 6082-T6 aluminum (E 70 GPa, yield 260 MPa, UTS 310 MPa, rho 2700 kg/m^3); end caps are 12 mm thick before the sealing flange. The hull houses a 4-cell 14.8 V Li-ion pack, navigation IMU, Jetson Orin Nano compute, and penetrators for 4 external thrusters. Load cases (unchanged): (LC1) 1.96 bar gauge external hydrostatic; (LC2) 7.84 bar gauge external proof (4x); (LC3) 9.8 bar gauge external burst-margin buckling check (5x); (LC4) 5 g impact on one end-cap bolt pattern (pool-wall collision); (LC5) thermal expansion from 5 C to 25 C with end caps fully bolted (Al hull vs steel fastener mismatch). Pass/fail criteria (unchanged): (R1) max von Mises under LC1 <= 87 MPa (260 / 3); (R2) under LC2 <= 260 MPa yield; (R3) linear buckling eigenvalue under LC3 >= 2.0; (R4) end-cap o-ring groove face deflection under LC1 <= 0.05 mm; (R5) hull dry mass <= 1.8 kg; (R6) under LC5 bolt preload <= 70% of bolt yield. In this multi-part rendering the pressure hull is decomposed into: (A) forward dome end cap (1), (B) aft dome end cap (1), (C) cylindrical hull tube (1), (D) internal frame rings (3 frames distributing payload loads and providing ring stiffness), (E) end-cap flanges / seal lands (2, one welded/machined to each end of C and mating to A and B), (F) through-hull fittings / penetrators (4 thruster penetrators + 1 umbilical dummy), (G) internal mounting rails (2 dovetail rails along the cylinder ID supporting the Li-ion pack, IMU, and Jetson compute), (H) end-cap fastener family (8 M4 A4-70 bolts per end cap = 16 bolts). Inter-part connections: flanges machined or welded onto the cylindrical tube, end caps bolted with double o-ring seal against the flange faces, internal frames bonded or interference-fit into the cylinder ID, mounting rails bolted to internal frames, through-hull penetrators threaded/epoxy-sealed into the end caps. Final FEM verification runs on the ASSEMBLED hull; per-part stress is reported but does not gate pass/fail. Inter-part connection DCR must be <= 1.0 under the governing load case (LC2 proof). All inherited load magnitudes, material properties, and pass/fail thresholds are preserved verbatim; assembly-scope criterion R_asm1 is added. Deliverables: STEP AP242 multi-body model with cylinder, two end caps, both flanges, three internal frames, four thruster penetrators + umbilical, two rails, and fastener instances as separate bodies; FEA per LC1/LC2/LC4/LC5; linear buckling per LC3; seal-groove deflection under LC1; mass + FoS summary; per-connection DCR table.
short_prompt:
Deliver the main electronics pressure hull of an AUV for the 2025 İnsansız Su Altı Sistemleri Yarışması as a multi-body assembly. Finals held in indoor pool of max depth 5 m; ABS-style proof pressure of 4x operational depth (equivalent to 20 m fresh water).

Envelope: horizontal cylinder, outer diameter 150 mm, total length 400 mm (excl. end-cap seals); two removable flat end caps 12 mm thick before sealing flange, sealed via double radial Parker 2-150 Buna-N 70A o-rings. Hull houses 4-cell 14.8 V Li-ion pack, IMU, Jetson Orin Nano compute, 4 thruster penetrators.

Material: 6082-T6 aluminium (yield 260 MPa, UTS 310 MPa).

Load cases: (LC1) 1.96 bar gauge external hydrostatic (normal); (LC2) 7.84 bar gauge proof (4x); (LC3) 9.8 bar gauge burst-margin buckling check (5x); (LC4) 5 g impact on one end-cap bolt pattern (pool-wall collision); (LC5) thermal expansion 5 C to 25 C with end caps fully bolted (Al hull vs steel fastener mismatch).

Pass/fail: (R1) max von Mises under LC1 <= 87 MPa (260/3); (R2) under LC2 <= 260 MPa yield; (R3) linear buckling eigenvalue under LC3 >= 2.0; (R4) o-ring groove face deflection under LC1 <= 0.05 mm; (R5) hull dry mass <= 1.8 kg; (R6) under LC5 bolt preload <= 70% of bolt yield.

prompt.title: AUV Main Electronics Pressure Hull (multi-part assembly)
prompt.brief: Al 6082-T6 cylindrical pressure hull 150 mm OD x 400 mm, 1.96 bar normal / 7.84 bar proof / 9.8 bar burst margin. Multi-part: forward and aft dome end caps, cylindrical tube, 3 internal frames, 2 end-cap flanges, 4 thruster through-hull fittings, 2 mounting rails, 16 end-cap bolts. FEM on assembled hull; connection DCR <= 1.0.

load_cases.name: hydrostatic_normal
load_cases.application: external on cylinder + end caps (normal mission, 20 m eq.)

load_cases.name: burst_margin_5x
load_cases.application: linear buckling check at external uniform pressure

load_cases.name: end_cap_impact_5g
load_cases.application: 5 g impact on one end-cap bolt pattern (pool-wall collision)

load_cases.name: thermal_5_to_25C
load_cases.application: thermal expansion with end caps fully bolted; Al/steel mismatch

parts.name: forward_dome_end_cap
parts.role: flat/dished end cap at forward end, sealed by double radial o-ring, houses thruster penetrators for forward pair

parts.name: aft_dome_end_cap
parts.role: flat/dished end cap at aft end, sealed by double radial o-ring, houses thruster penetrators for aft pair and umbilical dummy

parts.name: cylindrical_hull_tube
parts.role: main cylindrical pressure shell carrying hoop stress under external hydrostatic load; defines outer envelope

parts.name: internal_frame_ring
parts.role: ring stiffener supporting the cylinder against buckling and distributing payload mass into the shell (R3 governing)
parts.count_note: 3 rings typical at 1/4, 1/2, 3/4 length for a 400 mm cylinder; may extend to 4 if finer grid needed

parts.name: end_cap_flange_seal_land
parts.role: machined flange + seal-land at each cylinder end mating to A or B; carries the double o-ring grooves

parts.name: through_hull_fitting
parts.role: threaded penetrators in the end caps (4 thruster cables + 1 umbilical dummy) sealed by face o-ring
parts.count_note: 4 thruster penetrators mandated; umbilical dummy adds a 5th port
parts.material_hint: 316 stainless or Al 6061 with face o-ring

parts.name: internal_mounting_rail
parts.role: dovetail rail running along cylinder ID, bolted to internal frames, supports Li-ion pack and Jetson compute

parts.name: end_cap_fastener
parts.role: M4 A4-70 stainless bolts securing end caps to flanges; LC5 thermal preload check (R6) applies
parts.count_note: 8 bolts per end cap x 2 end caps = 16 instances

assembly_envelope.overall_bbox: cylinder 150 mm OD x 400 mm + two end caps x 12 mm
assembly_envelope.coordinate_system: z along hull longitudinal axis (forward +), x-y in end-cap plane, origin at aft end-cap outer face centre

pass_fail_criteria.description: Connection demand-to-capacity ratio (DCR) across all inter-part interfaces (IF1..IF8) <= 1.0 under governing load case (LC2 proof pressure).

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: Generated coverage gate: ensures prompt-level envelope, body-count, report-field, and part geometry constraints are represented by an explicit geometry audit experiment.
Generated coverage gate: ensures the declared load case is present in the CCX deck and checked from model.dat.

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: solid TET10 for A/B/C/E; shell or solid for D/G; axisymmetric option for LC1-LC3 if simplified; bolt preload via pretension elements at H

interfaces.load_path: flange/seal-land integral with cylinder end; carries circumferential o-ring reaction under LC1/LC2
forward end cap bolted against flange via 8 M4 bolts; seal preload across double o-ring
aft end cap bolted against flange via 8 M4 bolts
ring stiffeners fit into cylinder ID; react radial collapse under buckling (LC3)
mounting rails bolted to internal frames; carry payload inertial loads into shell
thruster through-hull fittings threaded into forward end cap
thruster + umbilical through-hull fittings threaded into aft end cap
fastener shear/tension through flange at each M4 bolt location

fem_check_policy.rationale: Seal-groove deflection (R4) and buckling margin (R3) are only meaningful on the assembled hull with end caps, flanges, and internal ring stiffeners in place. Per-part stress is reported for visibility but does not gate pass/fail.

notes.why_multi_part: Original brief explicitly requires STEP AP242 assembly with cylinder and two end caps as separate bodies plus bolt and o-ring reference models, and through-hull penetrators for 4 thrusters.
notes.speculation_caveats: Internal frame count (3), mounting-rail count (2), and exact flange integration (welded vs machined integral) are speculative; end-cap fastener count (8 per end) follows the bolt-pattern language of the original brief.

generated_eval_coverage.purpose: Add runnable CCX coverage kit for JSON-only multipart prompt.
generated_eval_coverage.note: Generated checks assert solver coverage for every FEA-grade requirement, every declared load case, and prompt-level geometry constraints; they are not a domain-specific certification model.
